miscTables.descr: insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, PC, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3, Amt4, Flex6) (select KeyID, Co, GL, PC, ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(Amt1,0)),2) as Amt1, ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(Amt2,0)),2) as Amt2, ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(Amt3,0)),2) as Amt3, ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(Amt4,0)),2) as Amt4, 'pass1' as Flex6  from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' group by KeyID, Co, GL, PC)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex6 is NULL
update TransX set GLdesc = c.Descr from TransX t inner join COA c on t.GL = c.GL where KeyID = '[batchID]'

update TransX set Hierarchy = p.Division, Flex2 = m.Field1, Flex3 = m.Field2 from TransX t inner join PCTRS p on t.PC = p.PCTR inner join Misc_Tables m on m.Table_ID = 'DACanalysis' and m.ID = 'Hierarchy' and m.Descr = p.Division where KeyID = '[batchID]'

update TransX set Hierarchy = p.Region, Flex2 = m.Field1, Flex3 = m.Field2 from TransX t inner join PCTRS p on t.PC = p.PCTR inner join Misc_Tables m on m.Table_ID = 'DACanalysis' and m.ID = 'Hierarchy' and m.Descr = p.Region where KeyID = '[batchID]'

update TransX set Hierarchy = p.Location, Flex2 = m.Field1, Flex3 = m.Field2 from TransX t inner join PCTRS p on t.PC = p.PCTR inner join Misc_Tables m on m.Table_ID = 'DACanalysis' and m.ID = 'Hierarchy' and m.Descr = p.Location where KeyID = '[batchID]'

update TransX set Hierarchy = p.Zone, Flex2 = m.Field1, Flex3 = m.Field2 from TransX t inner join PCTRS p on t.PC = p.PCTR inner join Misc_Tables m on m.Table_ID = 'DACanalysis' and m.ID = 'Hierarchy' and m.Descr = p.Zone where KeyID = '[batchID]'

update TransX set Hierarchy = p.Hierarchy, Flex2 = m.Field1, Flex3 = m.Field2 from TransX t inner join PCTRS p on t.PC = p.PCTR inner join Misc_Tables m on m.Table_ID = 'DACanalysis' and m.ID = 'Hierarchy' and m.Descr = p.Hierarchy where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Flex1 = m.Descr from TransX t inner join Misc_Tables m on t.GL >= m.Field1 and t.GL <= m.Field2 where KeyID = '[batchID]' and m.Table_ID = 'DACanalysis' and m.ID = 'GLgrp'

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, GLdesc, Flex1, PC,Hierarchy, Flex2,Flex3, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3, Amt4, Flex5) (select KeyID, Co, GL, GLdesc, Flex1, PC,Hierarchy, Flex2,Flex3, ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(Amt1,0)),2) as Amt1, ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(Amt2,0)),2) as Amt2, ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(Amt3,0)),2) as Amt3, ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(Amt4,0)),2) as Amt4, 'pass2' as Flex5  from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' group by KeyID, Co, GL, GLdesc, Flex1, PC,Hierarchy, Flex2,Flex3)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0 and Amt2 = 0 and Amt3 = 0 and Amt4 = 0
